title: TITO-LOBBY
description: TITO-LOBBY is a groundbreaking entry-level lobby plugin that lets you do everything you ever imagined.
body:
### 🛡️ TITO-LOBBY – Advanced Lobby Protection & Utility Plugin for Minecraft Servers

**TITO-LOBBY** is a modern, flexible, and well-optimized plugin designed to be the heart of your Minecraft hub or lobby server. It brings you a rich set of protection features, quality-of-life improvements, and customization options that ensure your server runs smoothly, securely, and professionally – all configurable through a clean and intuitive `config.yml`.

---

🎮 **Core Features**:
- 🔐 **Advanced Protection System**: Block unauthorized commands, building, breaking, explosions, portal creation, mob spawning, leaf decay, and more.
- 🛡️ **Player Safety**: Toggle invincibility, hunger, auto-heal, flight (with VIP-only option), and void teleportation to spawn.
- ✉️ **Chat Control**: Anti-spam, chat cooldown, full chat toggle, and detailed permission handling for admins and VIPs.
- 🎆 **Welcome System**: Customizable join/leave messages, timed welcome messages, and fireworks for VIP players.
- 📦 **Item Management**: Give players navigation tools (e.g. custom compass, server selector), and control item drop, pickup, movement, and interaction.
- 🚀 **Bouncepads**: Launch players into the air using customizable blocks with sounds and actionbar messages.
- 🧾 **Tablist Customization**: Dynamic tablist with support for variables like player count, ping, and TPS.

---

🛠️ **Configuration Highlights**:
- 🧩 Everything toggleable via config: You choose what features to enable or disable.
- 🎨 Full color code support (`&a`, `&e`, etc.).
- 🗂️ Clean YAML layout with clear comments and categories (Protection, Chat, Movement, Items, Tablist, etc.).
- 🪪 Permission system for Admins (`titolobby.op`) and VIPs (`titolobby.vip`).
- 🧼 Anti-abuse: Anti-spam, chat delay, and item interaction prevention.

---

🌐 **Best suited for**:
- Lobby / hub servers
- Minigame networks
- PvP/PvE server entry points
- Servers needing high-level spawn protection and polish

🔧 **Performance and Compatibility**:
- Java 17+
- Tested on Paper / LightSpigot / Leaf / PufferFish
- Compatible with Minecraft versions 1.16 – 1.21.8
- Lightweight and lag-free

---

📁 Example Configuration:
```yaml
adm-commands: true
invincible-players: true
item-drop-enabled: false
bouncepad-enabled: true
flight-for-vip: true
chat-delay: 3
server-selector-enabled: true
